item.title: University assistant predoctoral/PhD Candidate
item.description:
University: University of Vienna
Country: Austria

At the University of Vienna almost 11,000 personalities work together towards answering the big questions of the future. Around 7,700  of them do research and teaching, around 3,000 work in administration and organisation. We are looking for a/an University assistant predoctoral/PhD Candidate 51...
